text.title: Business Analysis Planning Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema draft-07 the produced artefact must satisfy. Validator (scripts/validate-ba-planning.py) enforces required keys + per-field constraints. Forbidden patterns are explicit anti-shapes the validator rejects.

example.note: T1_approach is a string not an object; T2_stakeholders is empty (min 3); T3/T4/T5 missing.

forbidden.pattern: T2 lists plausible-sounding roles ('Director of UX', 'VP of Platform') that do not exist in the org chart.
Single 'BA Plan' document is produced; T4 information-management and T5 performance-metrics are silently dropped.
